About Contact
Home / About

UX Designer & lead.

I care about solving meaningful problems and making complex processes feel simple. I’m comfortable in ambiguity and good at bringing structure to unclear spaces. I work closely with stakeholders to understand what the business is trying to achieve, and I use qualitative research to uncover what users actually need.

As a lead, I focus on giving teams clarity and direction. I make sure we’re solving the right problem before moving into solutions, help teams work through competing priorities, and keep momentum when things feel uncertain. I practise situational leadership — stepping in to guide when needed, stepping back to empower when the team has it covered.

I stay hands-on in the work. I design and prototype in whatever medium makes sense — paper, Figma, code, AI tools — while mentoring others through reviews, pairing, and open discussion. I give direct, constructive feedback and support people in developing their thinking, not just their outputs.

My front-end background keeps conversations grounded in what’s realistically buildable. I encourage early testing so issues surface before development, not after.

I'm focused on outputs that are clear, thoughtful, and genuinely useful. If that sounds like what you're looking for, I'd love to chat — please get in touch.

  • Ben Taylor — UX designer
